title: U.S. SEC nearing settlement with Wall Street firms over WhatsApp probe -sources
text: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is finalizing settlements with around two dozen Wall Street firms to resolve investigations into record-keeping lapses, said two people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Banks Have Problems but Their Stocks Are Cheap. 5 Worth a Look.
text: Higher interest rates, which were supposed to be a savior for the sector, have instead led to many problems.

title: Is U.S. Bancorp Stock a Buy?
text: U.S. Bancorp stock trades down about 21% year to date. The bank's capital ratios are above regulatory minimums but are at the bottom of its peer group.

title: U.S. Bancorp Marking Time In A Banking Sector That's Still Out Of Favor
text: U.S. Bancorp shares have been among the weakest performers in its peer group over the past six months, despite a growth outlook that is no worse (and arguably better). The Fed's proposals for new capital rules have come under fire and the final outcome remains uncertain, but USB management has moved quickly to boost its capital ratios. Higher deposit costs and weaker loan demand are weighing on revenue growth potential, but synergies from the Union Bank (including cross-selling and cost savings) can help drive above-average growth.

title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Stock to Watch on 5.6% Dividend Yield
text: Amid uncertain economic conditions, investors may desire to hold solid dividend-yielding stocks like U.S. Bancorp (USB) in their portfolios.

title: U.S. Bancorp: High-Quality Bank, With Tempting Dividend Yield At Steep Discount
text: Regional bank shares have fallen, and investors' confidence in the US financial system has declined. Thus offering enticing investment opportunities. Despite last quarter's disappointing results, looking at the big picture, USB revenues and interest income year to date are growing compared to YTD 2022. U.S. Bancorp has a diversified income composition, sound capital structure, and pays dividends with a respectable yield of 5.2%.

title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Rides on Revenue Growth Amid High Costs
text: A rise in revenues, solid loan and deposit balance and strategic expansion activities are likely to support U.S. Bancorp (USB). However, escalated expenses and lack of diversification in the loan portfolio are concerns.

title: Should You Invest in U.S. Bancorp (USB) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
text: Investors often turn to recommendations made by Wall Street analysts before making a Buy, Sell, or Hold decision about a stock. While media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm employed (or sell-side) analysts often affect a stock's price, do they really matter?
